assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 explicitly shows: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205' and states 'This creates task branch TC-9205 from the feature branch TC-9005.' The Branch Operations Summary table also lists 'Checkout target branch | git checkout TC-9005'.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 contains 'gh pr create --base TC-9005' and explicitly states 'Key: the PR targets --base TC-9005 (the feature branch), NOT --base main.' The Branch Operations Summary table also confirms 'Create PR | gh pr create --base TC-9005 ...'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and explicitly states 'The task branch name matches the Jira issue ID (TC-9205), which is distinct from the feature branch TC-9005.' The Branch Operations Summary table shows 'Create task branch | git checkout -b TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 4 ('Understand the Code') explicitly references all three files: (1) 'Inspect migration/src/lib.rs: Use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview to see the structure', (2) 'Inspect migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs: Use mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol with include_body=true to read the MigrationTrait implementation', (3) 'Inspect entity/src/advisory.rs: Use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview to verify the Advisory entity no longer references a Status column'. All inspection happens in Step 4 before implementation in Step 6.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 states: 'With trailer: --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"'. conventions.md also confirms the convention: 'Trailer: include --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"'.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 shows the commit message: 'refactor(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (Conventional Commits format with type 'refactor' and scope 'migration') and includes 'Implements TC-9205' in the footer.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 1 explicitly parses 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (a feature branch, not main)' and includes a dedicated subsection 'Target Branch extraction' stating: 'The Target Branch is TC-9005. This is a feature branch (not main). The task branch will be created from TC-9005, and the PR will target --base TC-9005.'
